question: How should I drive a Rive state machine from React for a new project?
required_concepts: Recommend Data Binding with View Models for new work
Use exported View Model Instances as the designer-developer contract
Explain boolean properties versus triggers for sustained and one-shot state changes
red_flags: Recommends legacy Inputs for new work
Presents React-only guidance without the cross-platform pattern
ideal_answer_shape: Start with the modern cross-platform pattern
Then show the React-specific API shape
Call out the legacy Input approach only as deprecated context
